title: Hyperspace Orbiting Scanner
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hyperspace Orbiting Scanner''' or '''HOS''' was a device used by the [[Imperial CompLink]].

==Characteristics==
Initially proposed by [[Geothray Camber]] and further refined by a team under Dr. [[Lindu Sencker]], the HOS was left in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] near a planet, and recorded the hyperspace shadows left by particles of a computer. The shadows would then be matched to the shadows of known computer languages to recreate the data. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was seventy-eight percent effective.<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref>

The HOS was served by [[Tech 4 PDV]]s that entered [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], tracking the scanner through triangulations of known locations, a process that took [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] to complete. Transfer of data from the PDV to the HOS, or effecting repairs to the HOS, had to be conducted in [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]], which was a vulnerable time for both apparatus.<ref name="ISB" />

==Sources==

*<!-- 1994-07-XX -->[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]
